ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

git.description: (Block List) Git generators generates parameters using either the directory structure of a specified Git repository (directory generator), or, using the contents of JSON/YAML files found within a specified repository (file generator). (see below for nested schema)

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

file.description: (Block List) List of files in the source repository to use when template the Application. (see below for nested schema)

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

requeueAfterSeconds.description: (String) How often to check for changes (in seconds). Default: 3min.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

merge.description: particularly regarding nesting merge generators. (see below for nested schema)

generator.description: (Block List, Min: 1) Application set generators are responsible for generation of params, which are then rendered into the template: fields of the ApplicationSet resource. (see below for nested schema)

clusterDecisionResource.description: (Block List) The cluster decision resource generates a list of Argo CD clusters. (see below for nested schema)

configMapRef.description: (String) ConfigMap with the duck type definitions needed to retrieve the data this includes apiVersion(group/version), kind, matchKey and validation settings.

labelSelector.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Label selector used to find the resource defined in the config_map_ref. Alternative to name. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

requeueAfterSeconds.description: (String) How often to check for changes (in seconds). Default: 3min.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

spec.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Spec of the GitOps applicationset. Includes the generators and template. (see below for nested schema)

destination.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Reference to the Kubernetes server and namespace in which the application will be deployed. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

server.description: (String) URL of the target cluster and must be set to the Kubernetes control plane API.

group.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Group to match for.

jqPathExpressions.description: (List of String) List of JQ path expression strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

jsonPointers.description: (List of String) List of JSONPaths strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

kind.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Kind to match for.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

source.description: (Block List) Location of the application's manifests or chart. (see below for nested schema)

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

include.description: (String) Glob pattern to match paths against that should be explicitly included during manifest generation. If this field is set, only matching manifests will be included. To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

code.description: (Boolean) Determines whether the variable should be evaluated as jsonnet code or treated as string.

Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

recurse.description: (Boolean) Whether to scan a directory recursively for manifests.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

source.description: (Block List) Location of the application's manifests or chart. (see below for nested schema)

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

include.description: (String) Glob pattern to match paths against that should be explicitly included during manifest generation. If this field is set, only matching manifests will be included. To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

jsonnet.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Jsonnet specific options. (see below for nested schema)

extVar.description: (Block List) List of Jsonnet External Variables. (see below for nested schema)

code.description: (Boolean) Determines whether the variable should be evaluated as jsonnet code or treated as string.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

mergeKeys.description: (List of String) Keys to merge into resulting parameter set.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

valuesObject.description: (Map of String) Helm values to be passed to 'helm template', typically defined as a block.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

kustomize.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Kustomize specific options. (see below for nested schema)

commonAnnotations.description: (Map of String) List of additional annotations to add to rendered manifests.

commonLabels.description: (Map of String) List of additional labels to add to rendered manifests.

forceCommonAnnotations.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force applying common annotations to resources for kustomize apps.

forceCommonLabels.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force apply common labels to resources for kustomize apps.

images.description: (List of String) List of Kustomize image override specifications.

namePrefix.description: (String) Prefix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

nameSuffix.description: (String) Suffix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

plugin.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Config management plugin specific options. (see below for nested schema)

env.description: (Block List) Environment variables passed to the plugin. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

(String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

sources.description: (Block List) Location of the application's manifests or chart. Use when specifying multiple fields (see below for nested schema)

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

include.description: (String) Glob pattern to match paths against that should be explicitly included during manifest generation. If this field is set, only matching manifests will be included. To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

jsonnet.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Jsonnet specific options. (see below for nested schema)

extVar.description: (Block List) List of Jsonnet External Variables. (see below for nested schema)

code.description: (Boolean) Determines whether the variable should be evaluated as jsonnet code or treated as string.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

libs.description: (List of String) Additional library search dirs.

ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

clusters.description: (Block List) The cluster generator produces parameters based on the list of items found within the cluster secret. (see below for nested schema)

enabled.description: (Boolean) Boolean value defaulting to true to indicate that this block has been added thereby allowing all other attributes to be optional.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

spec.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Spec of the GitOps applicationset. Includes the generators and template. (see below for nested schema)

destination.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Reference to the Kubernetes server and namespace in which the application will be deployed. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

server.description: (String) URL of the target cluster and must be set to the Kubernetes control plane API.

group.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Group to match for.

jqPathExpressions.description: (List of String) List of JQ path expression strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

jsonPointers.description: (List of String) List of JSONPaths strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

kind.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Kind to match for.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

kind.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Kind to match for.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

clusters.description: (Block List) The cluster generator produces parameters based on the list of items found within the cluster secret. (see below for nested schema)

enabled.description: (Boolean) Boolean value defaulting to true to indicate that this block has been added thereby allowing all other attributes to be optional.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

revision.description: (String) Revision of the source repository to use.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

spec.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Spec of the GitOps applicationset. Includes the generators and template. (see below for nested schema)

destination.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Reference to the Kubernetes server and namespace in which the application will be deployed. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

server.description: (String) URL of the target cluster and must be set to the Kubernetes control plane API.

group.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Group to match for.

jqPathExpressions.description: (List of String) List of JQ path expression strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

jsonPointers.description: (List of String) List of JSONPaths strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

kind.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Kind to match for.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

source.description: (Block List) Location of the application's manifests or chart. (see below for nested schema)

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

include.description: (String) Glob pattern to match paths against that should be explicitly included during manifest generation. If this field is set, only matching manifests will be included. To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

jsonnet.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Jsonnet specific options. (see below for nested schema)

extVar.description: (Block List) List of Jsonnet External Variables. (see below for nested schema)

code.description: (Boolean) Determines whether the variable should be evaluated as jsonnet code or treated as string.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

libs.description: (List of String) Additional library search dirs.

Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

recurse.description: (Boolean) Whether to scan a directory recursively for manifests.

fileParameters.description: (Block List) File parameters for the helm template. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. forceString.description: (Boolean) Determines whether to tell Helm to interpret booleans and numbers as strings.

passCredentials.description: -pass-credentials' to Helm commands to pass credentials to all domains.

releaseName.description: (String) Helm release name. If omitted it will use the application name.

valueFiles.description: (List of String) List of Helm value files to use when generating a template.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

valuesObject.description: (Map of String) Helm values to be passed to 'helm template', typically defined as a block.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

forceCommonAnnotations.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force applying common annotations to resources for kustomize apps.

forceCommonLabels.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force apply common labels to resources for kustomize apps.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

list.description: (Block List) List generators generate parameters based on an arbitrary list of key/value pairs (as long as the values are string values). (see below for nested schema)

elements.description: (List of Map of String) List of key/value pairs to pass as parameters into the template.

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

plugin.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Config management plugin specific options. (see below for nested schema)

env.description: (Block List) Environment variables passed to the plugin. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

(String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

sources.description: (Block List) Location of the application's manifests or chart. Use when specifying multiple fields (see below for nested schema)

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

include.description: (String) Glob pattern to match paths against that should be explicitly included during manifest generation. If this field is set, only matching manifests will be included. To match multiple patterns, wrap the patterns in {} and separate them with commas. For example: '{.yml,.yaml}'

jsonnet.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Jsonnet specific options. (see below for nested schema)

extVar.description: (Block List) List of Jsonnet External Variables. (see below for nested schema)

code.description: (Boolean) Determines whether the variable should be evaluated as jsonnet code or treated as string.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

libs.description: (List of String) Additional library search dirs.

fileParameters.description: (Block List) File parameters for the helm template. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

parameters.description: (Block List) Helm parameters which are passed to the helm template command upon manifest generation. (see below for nested schema)

forceString.description: (Boolean) Determines whether to tell Helm to interpret booleans and numbers as strings.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. passCredentials.description: -pass-credentials' to Helm commands to pass credentials to all domains.

releaseName.description: (String) Helm release name. If omitted it will use the application name.

valueFiles.description: (List of String) List of Helm value files to use when generating a template.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

valuesObject.description: (Map of String) Helm values to be passed to 'helm template', typically defined as a block.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

kustomize.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Kustomize specific options. (see below for nested schema)

commonAnnotations.description: (Map of String) List of additional annotations to add to rendered manifests.

commonLabels.description: (Map of String) List of additional labels to add to rendered manifests.

forceCommonAnnotations.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force applying common annotations to resources for kustomize apps.

forceCommonLabels.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force apply common labels to resources for kustomize apps.

namePrefix.description: (String) Prefix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

nameSuffix.description: (String) Suffix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

plugin.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Config management plugin specific options. (see below for nested schema)

env.description: (Block List) Environment variables passed to the plugin. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

spec.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Spec of the GitOps applicationset. Includes the generators and template. (see below for nested schema)

destination.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Reference to the Kubernetes server and namespace in which the application will be deployed. (see below for nested schema)

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

recurse.description: (Boolean) Whether to scan a directory recursively for manifests.

helm.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Helm specific options. (see below for nested schema)

fileParameters.description: (Block List) File parameters for the helm template. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

path.description: (String) Directory path within the repository. Only valid for applications sourced from Git.

parameters.description: (Block List) Helm parameters which are passed to the helm template command upon manifest generation. (see below for nested schema)

forceString.description: (Boolean) Determines whether to tell Helm to interpret booleans and numbers as strings.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

passCredentials.description: -pass-credentials' to Helm commands to pass credentials to all domains.

releaseName.description: (String) Helm release name. If omitted it will use the application name.

valueFiles.description: (List of String) List of Helm value files to use when generating a template.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

valuesObject.description: (Map of String) Helm values to be passed to 'helm template', typically defined as a block.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").

kustomize.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Kustomize specific options. (see below for nested schema)

commonAnnotations.description: (Map of String) List of additional annotations to add to rendered manifests.

commonLabels.description: (Map of String) List of additional labels to add to rendered manifests.

forceCommonAnnotations.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force applying common annotations to resources for kustomize apps.

forceCommonLabels.description: (Boolean) Indicates if to force apply common labels to resources for kustomize apps.

images.description: (List of String) List of Kustomize image override specifications.

namePrefix.description: (String) Prefix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

nameSuffix.description: (String) Suffix appended to resources for Kustomize apps.

env.description: (Block List) Environment variables passed to the plugin. (see below for nested schema)

ref.description: (String) Reference to another source within defined sources. See associated documentation on Helm value files from external Git repository regarding combining ref with path and/or chart.

repoUrl.description: (String) URL to the repository (Git or Helm) that contains the application manifests.

targetRevision.description: (String) Revision of the source to sync the application to. In case of Git, this can be commit, tag, or branch. If omitted, will equal to HEAD. In case of Helm, this is a semver tag for the Chart's version.

syncPolicy.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Application Set sync policy (see below for nested schema)

automated.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Whether to automatically keep an application synced to the target revision. (see below for nested schema)

allowEmpty.description: (Boolean) Allows apps have zero live resources.

prune.description: (Boolean) Whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync.

selfHeal.description: (Boolean) Whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls metadata in the given namespace (if CreateNamespace=true). (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

clusters.description: (Block List) The cluster generator produces parameters based on the list of items found within the cluster secret. (see below for nested schema)

enabled.description: (Boolean) Boolean value defaulting to true to indicate that this block has been added thereby allowing all other attributes to be optional.

selector.description: filter based on generated values using the kubernetes common labelSelector format. (see below for nested schema)

matchExpressions.description: (Block List) A list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed. (see below for nested schema)

key.description: (String) The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: (String) A key's relationship to a set of values. Valid operators ard In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

matchLabels.description: (Map of String) A map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of match_expressions, whose key field is "key", the operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

template.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Application Set template. The template fields of the ApplicationSet spec are used to generate Gitops Applications. (see below for nested schema)

metadata.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Standard Kubernetes object metadata. (see below for nested schema)

annotations.description: (Map of String) Annotations are unstructured key value pairs corresponding to a resource. External tools set these to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata.

finalizers.description: (List of String) List of finalizers to apply to the resulting Application.

labels.description: (Map of String) Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

spec.description: (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Spec of the GitOps applicationset. Includes the generators and template. (see below for nested schema)

destination.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Reference to the Kubernetes server and namespace in which the application will be deployed. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

server.description: (String) URL of the target cluster and must be set to the Kubernetes control plane API.

group.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Group to match for.

jqPathExpressions.description: (List of String) List of JQ path expression strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

jsonPointers.description: (List of String) List of JSONPaths strings targeting the field(s) to ignore.

kind.description: (String) The Kubernetes resource Kind to match for.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

namespace.description: (String) Namespace of the GitOps application. An empty namespace is equivalent to the namespace of the GitOps agent.

info.description: (Block List) List of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application. (see below for nested schema)

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

project.description: (String) The project the application belongs to.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

chart.description: (String) Helm chart name. Must be specified for applications sourced from a Helm repo.

directory.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Path/directory specific options. (see below for nested schema)

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (String) Limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions. This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances. Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used. Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it. Default is 10.

retry.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls failed sync retry behavior. (see below for nested schema)

backoff.description: (Block List, Max: 1) Controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs. (see below for nested schema)

duration.description: (String) Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

factor.description: (String) Factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry.

maxDuration.description: (String) Maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. 2m, 1h), as a string.

limit.description: (String) Maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

name.description: (String) Name must be unique within a namespace. It is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Name cannot be updated.

passCredentials.description: -pass-credentials' to Helm commands to pass credentials to all domains.

releaseName.description: (String) Helm release name. If omitted it will use the application name.

valueFiles.description: (List of String) List of Helm value files to use when generating a template.

values.description: value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template.

valuesObject.description: (Map of String) Helm values to be passed to 'helm template', typically defined as a block.

version.description: (String) Helm version to use for templating (either "2" or "3").
